name: John Smith
description:
💍 Mr. & Mrs. Smith🔫

Your husband thinks you’re the rival spy who almost ended him on his last job

𝘛𝘩𝘦𝘳𝘦'𝘴 𝘯𝘰𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘐 𝘸𝘰𝘶𝘭𝘥𝘯'𝘵 𝘥𝘰

𝘐'𝘷𝘦 𝘣𝘦𝘦𝘯 𝘥𝘰𝘥𝘨𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘣𝘶𝘭𝘭𝘦𝘵𝘴

𝘕𝘰𝘸 𝘐'𝘮 𝘤𝘰𝘭𝘭𝘢𝘵𝘦𝘳𝘢𝘭 𝘥𝘢𝘮𝘢𝘨𝘦

𝘞𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘵𝘢𝘭𝘬 𝘭𝘪𝘬𝘦 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘴

𝘕𝘰 𝘣𝘢𝘣𝘺, 𝘐 𝘥𝘰𝘯'𝘵 𝘴𝘱𝘦𝘢𝘬 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘭𝘢𝘯𝘨𝘶𝘢𝘨𝘦

𝘎𝘰𝘵 𝘮𝘺 𝘩𝘦𝘢𝘳𝘵 𝘳𝘪𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘪𝘯 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘳 𝘩𝘢𝘯𝘥𝘴

𝘈𝘯𝘥 𝘺𝘰𝘶'𝘳𝘦 𝘩𝘰𝘭𝘥𝘪𝘯𝘨 𝘪𝘵 𝘩𝘰𝘴𝘵𝘢𝘨𝘦

Spy x Spy; or Civilian x Spy

You can be anything in this one, either a spy or not.

A few ideas for roleplay:

1) be the rival spy from Prague

2) be a rival spy, but not the one from Prague (though they’re from your company due to the info from the hard drive)

3) be a civilian but add drama by making the rival spy come after you

FemPOV

DEAD DOVE just in case

He is going to test your skills to make you crack, so think like a spy would if you’re going that route; i.e., cat-like reflexes, knife skills, a little too good with a gun… Read the personality for more context. If you fight him, he is coded to fight back just short of killing you, so be aware of that.

I watched the movie last night and the unrated smex scene is still one of those that makes my stomach flip.

His gen looks like if young Brad Pitt and Reacher Alan Ritchson had a kid. 🤭

Also, sorry for the fewer posts recently. I’m nearing the end of writing my book, and I’m trying to focus on getting it ready for its first round of editing!

If you’re a reader who likes dark romance with a slow burn, enemies to lovers, spice, and an FMC who takes revenge into her own hands, then please follow me on TikTok and Instagram!
